---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new metric, view, or behavior
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

The concrete situation where you wanted MacVital to do something it
doesn't do today.

## Proposed solution

What you think should happen. Be specific about which tab or surface,
what metric or interaction, and what the success state looks like.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways the same problem could be solved.

## Additional context

Related macOS APIs, similar features in other apps, screenshots.
